name: Petronas Dagangan Bhd
summary: Petronas Dagangan Bhd is the principal domestic marketing and distribution arm of Petroliam Nasional Berhad (PETRONAS), marketing and distributing refined petroleum products, liquefied petroleum gas (LPG), and lubricants, and operating a chain of retail service stations in Malaysia. They also offer aviation fuel and related services. The company is headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
